ResourceHeader.AlternateName: Colorado Student Space Weather Experiment, CSSWE, CubeSat

RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: The Colorado Student Space Weather Experiment, CSSWE, is an NSF-funded 3U CubeSat (30×10×10 cm) which houses an Energetic Particle Telescope. The Relativistic Electron and Proton Telescope integrated little experiment, REPTile, will provide Directional Differential Flux Measurements of High-Energy Electrons and Protons.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge the NSF, X. Xinlin, S. Palo, S. Kanekal, L. Blum, D. Gerhardt, and the Universtity of Colorado, Bouder Students that worked so hard to make this CubeSat Mission possible

InformationURL.Name: Colorado Student Space Weather Experiment, CSSWE, CubeSat Description, UCB
InformationURL.Description: Colorado Student Space Weather Experiment, CSSWE, CubeSat Overview hosted by the University of Colorado, Boulder

InformationURL.Name: Colorado Student Space Weather Experiment, CSSWE, CubeSat Publication
InformationURL.Description: The Colorado Student Space Weather Experiment (CSSWE) On-Orbit Performance, JoSS, Vol. 3(1), 265-281, 2013

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
